scripts.dev: node scripts/content-sandbox.mjs seed dev && concurrently -n api,admin,site -c blue,magenta,green "SETU_API_PORT=4444 SETU_REPO_DIR=$PWD/.content-sandbox/dev pnpm --filter @setu/api dev" "VITE_SETU_API=http://localhost:4444 VITE_SETU_SITE=http://localhost:4321 pnpm --filter @setu/admin dev" "SETU_CONTENT_DIR=$PWD/.content-sandbox/dev/content SETU_API_URL=http://localhost:4444 pnpm --filter @setu/site dev"
